Patch Set 3: Code-Review-2

ugh, this is REALLY-REALLY strange!

The client cache patch is entirely client only so server version should NOT be a factor.

We don't even use opencount value of 1 so the 2.12 server compat should not be compromised either but looking a the test (Against 2.12.6) - it IS somehow failing the touch.

Either way the correct fix here is the compat flag we introduce in https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/43907/3

Abandoned

Abandoning this patch for the fix of this issue at https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/43907/

commit.subject: LU-14743 tests: skip sanity test 429 for older servers
commit.message:
LU-14743 tests: skip sanity test 429 for older servers 

sanity test 429 was added to Lustre 2.14.51.142.  All
version interoperability testing with Lustre clients
2.14.51.142 and later with Lustre servers prior to this
version will fail.  Thus, skip sanity 429 for this
combination of Lustre servers and clients.

Fixes: 41d99c4902 ("LU-10948 llite: Introduce inode open heat counter")
Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.12.6 serverdistro=el7.9 env=ONLY=429 testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I56b00e9e4a4b39c94c86fc86c9f669a7a16e72dc
